name: Damiana
summary: damiana is tracked for stress with conservative evidence framing. Keep claims tied to source-backed preparation and safety context.
safetyNotes: Human evidence is limited. Use conservative dosing; avoid stacking with sedatives, stimulants, or sexual-performance products without review.
contraindications: planned surgery or complex psychiatric medication regimens.
interactions: Potential additive CNS effects with sedatives
